note: Confirmatory battery. Authored and committed BEFORE any tuning run of the perception prompt or decision layer (see git history: this file lands in the first commit of the tuning branch). Category composition is fixed to match battery v1 exactly (10 unresolved_pronoun / 8 context_resolvable / 8 underspecified / 10 clear_control / 8 intent_trap / 6 mixed_intent) so case selection cannot be shaped by tuning outcomes. Single confirmatory run: the tuned config is frozen (merged) first, then this battery is run ONCE and the G1-G5 verdict is reported verbatim. Do not use for tuning; do not rerun after seeing results.
